Create a graph-visible D585 application evidence store-frame decode bundle.

## Import

```ts
import { agenticMemoryApplicationEvidenceStoreFrameBundle } from "@graphrefly/ts/solutions";
```

## Signature

```ts
function agenticMemoryApplicationEvidenceStoreFrameBundle(
	graph: Graph,
	opts: AgenticMemoryApplicationEvidenceStoreFrameBundleOptions,
): AgenticMemoryApplicationEvidenceStoreFrameBundle
```

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `graph` | `Graph` | Graph that owns the nodes. |
| `opts` | `AgenticMemoryApplicationEvidenceStoreFrameBundleOptions` | Store-frame input node and optional name. |

## Returns

Projection and read-model nodes.
